title: Laborers and Freight, Stock, and Material Movers, Hand
description: Manually move freight, stock, luggage, or other materials, or perform other general labor. Includes all manual laborers not elsewhere classified.

tasks.text: Maintain equipment storage areas to ensure that inventory is protected.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read work orders or receive oral instructions to determine work assignments or material or equipment needs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Move freight, stock, or other materials to and from storage or production areas, loading docks, delivery vehicles, ships, or containers, by hand or using trucks, tractors, or other equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install protective devices, such as bracing, padding, or strapping, to prevent shifting or damage to items being transported.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sort cargo before loading and unloading.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Attach identifying tags to containers or mark them with identifying information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record numbers of units handled or moved, using daily production sheets or work tickets.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Attach slings, hooks, or other devices to lift cargo and guide loads.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Carry needed tools or supplies from storage or trucks and return them after use.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Pack containers and re-pack damaged containers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assemble product containers or crates, using hand tools and precut lumber.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust controls to guide, position, or move equipment, such as cranes, booms, or cameras.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Connect electrical equipment to power sources so that it can be tested before use.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
